payload.answer: I can’t determine which specific AI memory articles you’ve saved because the saved-article records (titles/links/IDs) are not present in the provided input.

entity_resolution.reason: The provided fixture input does not include the actual list of saved articles or their titles/IDs.

payload.intent: Recall AI memory articles saved by the user

memory_cards.statement: The query asks which AI memory–related articles the user has saved.

details: No article titles/URLs/IDs were included in the supplied fixture input, so recall cannot be performed.

repair_options: Provide the saved-articles list/table from the Brain/Cognee memory system (titles, URLs, or article IDs).
Share the specific memory record(s) that contain the “saved about AI memory” entries.
If there is a knowledge-graph node or index for “saved AI memory articles,” include its contents.
